title: trifolium michelianum subsp. balansae
intro: Trifolium michelianum subsp. balansae, also known as Balansa clover, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of isoflavones and other bioactive compounds. The plant's health benefits include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce menopausal symptoms, and act as an antioxidant. Balansa clover can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
